passages.title: Jinggang Mountains Reviews
paragraphs: A must-see — Sun Lin, Xining, China

My trip to the Jinggangshan Revolution Museum was amazing! I walked around the museum for hours and saw many old books and photos. The volunteers told great stories about the Red Army. The stories were really inspiring. I learnt a lot. Do you want to learn more about the Red Army? You should go there!
Wonderful views and food — Colin, London, UK

This was a great place for a summer trip! We climbed the Jinggang Mountains and took many photos of the bamboo forest and beautiful waterfalls. We tried delicious pumpkin soup and red rice in a nice restaurant too. The Jinggang Mountains are only about 1.5 hours from the airport by bus. I want to go there again!

passages.title: Eye-opening findings in Sanxingdui
paragraphs: My last trip to Sanxingdui was great! In the Sanxingdui Museum, I saw strange masks, the "big guy" statue and a life-size "fruit" tree lamp.
Some believed people from Sanxingdui were aliens. But it's not true. They might eat hotpot three thousand years ago, just like we do today. (Chen Li, history teacher)

passages.title: The pearl of Hangzhou
paragraphs: I visited the West Lake last autumn. On the first night, my friends and I watched the moon rising from a boat on the lake. We ate mooncakes and drank Longjing tea. The next day we walked along the lake. It was such a nice trip. (Jessica, nurse)
